jd_text: 1. CXO Office & Strategic Execution Act as an extension of the CXO in driving key business priorities Translate strategy into actionable plans with clear milestones and outcomes Drive governance cadence (reviews, dashboards) across business units 2. AI-Led Transformation (Core Focus) Lead the identification and implementation of AI use cases across: Partner with Product, Data and Tech teams to scale AI/ML initiatives Drive adoption of GenAI tools across functions to improve productivity Track ROI and business impact of AI deployments 3. Cross-Functional Leadership Drive alignment across Product, Engineering, Marketing and Business teams Lead high-priority, ambiguous and cross-cutting projects Identify and unblock execution bottlenecks 4. Business Insights & Decision Support Build executive dashboards and insights for decision-making Conduct deep dives on growth, margins, and customer metrics Support strategic initiatives including new business launches 5. Stakeholder & Communication Management Prepare CXO-level presentations, board updates and strategy documents Interface with senior leadership and external stakeholders Drive internal communication and alignment on key priorities Candidate Profile Experience 10–15 years of experience in strategy, consulting and business roles. Exposure to AI/ML or data-driven organizations is a strong plus. Must-Have Skills Strong problem-solving and structured thinking High ownership and ability to drive execution in ambiguous environments Excellent stakeholder management and communication Strong analytical skills and comfort with data Strong understanding of AI/ML and Generative AI applications in business
